pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities in transferFrom, list, and distribute functions. SWC-107 applies because the checkBots modifier makes external calls before state updates, violating Checks-Effects-Interactions. SWC-115 is relevant as the delegate function contains a critical delegatecall vulnerability allowing unauthorized state modifications. Evidence: Reentrancy found in transferFrom, list, distribute functions (Finding 3); checkBots modifier calls botProtection before state updates (Finding 4); delegate function has delegatecall vulnerability (Finding 3)

raw.pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities in transferFrom, list, and distribute functions. SWC-107 applies because the checkBots modifier makes external calls before state updates, violating Checks-Effects-Interactions. SWC-115 is relevant as the delegate function contains a critical delegatecall vulnerability allowing unauthorized state modifications. Evidence: Reentrancy found in transferFrom, list, distribute functions (Finding 3); checkBots modifier calls botProtection before state updates (Finding 4); delegate function has delegatecall vulnerability (Finding 3)

SWC-107 applies because the checkBots modifier makes external calls before state updates, violating Checks-Effects-Interactions. SWC-115 is relevant as the delegate function contains a critical delegatecall vulnerability allowing unauthorized state modifications.
evidence: Reentrancy found in transferFrom, list, distribute functions (Finding 3)
